content.query:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [customer].[stg_mortality1_t]
( 
	[record_id] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[input_token] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[UDF1] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[UDF2] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[UDF3] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[deceased_match_indicator] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[date_of_death] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[verified_or_proof_code] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[deceased_source] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[deceased_county] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[deceased_state] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[confidence_score] [nvarchar](5)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
